summary: ThreeDScene hydrogen 2p_z orbital isosurface |ψ|²=c. Radial equation r²e^(-r)=c²/cos²θ solved per frame via 20-iter Newton. ORANGE-YELLOW upper lobe (+) and BLUE-PURPLE lower lobe (-) via always_redraw Surface. ValueTracker density_tr tours {0.3, 0.5, 0.2, 0.1, 0.4}. Ambient camera rotation.
